programme.title: Twelve Deadly Coins
programme.desc: Flipping a coin' takes on a whole new meaning in this action-packed, martial arts melodrama - because the pocket change is actually deadly kung-fu weapons.

programme.title: Come Drink With Me
programme.desc: King Hu's groundbreaking film set the foundation for all his action films that followed, most notably Crouching Tiger Hidden Dragon.

programme.title: Man of Iron
programme.desc: In this fight-filled sequel, Chen Kuan-tai's character wins a bet against a gang leader's son. Soon, father and son are hot on his heels!

programme.title: When the Clouds Roll by
programme.desc: A doctor falls for a schizophrenic old classmate he's treating who refuses to accept that her lover is dead.

programme.title: The Brave Archer
programme.desc: A man (Alexander Fu Sheng) must learn several unique martial arts styles and compete in three trials before he can marry his beloved.

programme.title: Melody of Love
programme.desc: This light-hearted 'a-go-go' romance depicts how three doctors pursue three beauties who play hard to get!

programme.title: The Lady Hermit
programme.desc: A pair of female martial artists end up banding together to go up against the evil Black Demon. Starring Cheng Pei Pei.

programme.title: Fangs of the Cobra
programme.desc: Follow a virtuous viper as it sniffs out bombs, fights gangs, battles a baby-killing rodent and even takes on a dangerous lady in this thriller!

programme.title: The Sword Stained With Royal Blood
programme.desc: Havoc dogs a swordsman who uncovers a sword, training manual, treasure map and a secret message on the body of a deceased master.

programme.title: Black Magic
programme.desc: Ti Lung plays a helpless man who is under the spell of an evil witch doctor in this bone-chilling tale of good versus evil.

programme.title: One Way Only
programme.desc: A motorcycle workshop owner feels compelled to damn the physical and legal consequences and go on racing.

programme.title: The Adventures of Emperor Chien Lung
programme.desc: Based on the folk legend, director Li Han Hsiang presents this humorous portrayal of the Emperor Chien Lung's adventures in Jiang Nan.

programme.title: The Mad Monk Strikes Again
programme.desc: In this sequel, the Mad Monk is joined by immortal scholar-turned-genie, Lu Tung Pin, as they both wreak havoc in an attempt to outdo each other!

programme.title: Carry on Doctors and Nurses
programme.desc: Director Anthony Chan joins award-winning social satirist Alfred Cheung Kin Ting in this delightful variation on the hugely successful British Carry On!

programme.title: Hex Vs Witchcraft
programme.desc: After a compulsive gambler's wife leaves him, he gets offered a beautiful ghost as his new wife.

programme.title: The Bloody Escape
programme.desc: Sun Chung teams up with real-life kungfu champion Chen Kuan-tai and martial arts choreographer Liu Chia-yung to tell the tale of a bandit with a conscience.

programme.title: Spring Blossoms
programme.desc: Three single females and the men they fall for think things are simple and blissful until the lasses' parents enter into the picture.

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: While returning the stolen Golden Sword to the palace, a sword master's daughter is pursued and poisoned by an evil master, only to return as a spirit to take revenge against the evildoer.

programme.title: Crocodile River
programme.desc: Two students fall in love but their two families are enemies and separated by a river that is filled with crocodiles and beasts.

programme.title: What Price Honesty
programme.desc: Pai Piao, Danny Lee and 'Venom's' Sun Chien play idealistic police graduates who run afoul of powerful, corrupt individuals in this farsighted film.

programme.title: The Duel of the Century
programme.desc: Two men find more than they bargained for when they attempt to investigate the apparent murder of a swordsman.

programme.title: The 36th Chamber of Shaolin
programme.desc: Winner of Best Martial Arts Award at the 1978 Asian Film Festival, this piece is directed by Liu Chia-liang and features his brother, Gordon, as a martial arts master.

programme.title: The Shadow Boxing
programme.desc: Wong Yue and Gordon Liu star in this entertaining 'hopping vampire' action comedy.

programme.title: Marco Polo
programme.desc: Directed by the legendary Chang Cheh, this rousing tale presents a fictional account of the famous Italian explorer's adventures.

programme.title: Love With the Perfect Stranger
programme.desc: Pauline Wong plays a pregnant student who marries a sympathetic, yet equally heartbroken, passer-by in Jamie Luk's directing debut.

programme.title: The Devil's Mirror
programme.desc: In Sun Chung's first film for the Shaw Brothers, a 'devil girl' turns one clan against another to acquire two powerful magic mirrors.

programme.title: Danger Has Two Faces
programme.desc: Bryan Leung stars in this action movie as a former cop turned pet store owner who is unable to lead a peaceful life.

programme.title: The Swordmates
programme.desc: After a man's household pays dearly for his faith in his business rival, he turns to his swordmate and that man's son for help.

programme.title: Tali dan Tangga - EP 8
programme.desc: Get ready for an exhilarating journey through the world of Snakes & Ladders like never before! Participants will enjoy a jazzed-up version of the beloved Snakes and Ladders game, adding excitement and nostalgia to the experience. Trivia questions woven into the game provide an opportunity for learning while playing, making it a fun and enriching experience for all. Players have the chance to win i

programme.title: Mata Pancing - EP 3
programme.desc: For those who loves to fish, this program would be very suitable option for the audience. The program describes all about fishing in very attractive way and fun.

programme.title: Joran Borneo 2 - EP 2
programme.desc: Malaysia’s top fishing sifus, especially from Borneo, compete in an intense showdown to catch rare and massive game fish found only in remote locations. Venturing deep into Upper Borneo near the Kalimantan border, they face extreme terrain, unpredictable waters, and high-stakes challenges—all in pursuit of the ultimate title: Fishing Guru.

programme.title: Mimar - EP 6
programme.desc: A unique Islamic Architecture in Malaysia, which is influenced by archipelago culture and local history as well as Ottoman, Moorish, Byzantine and Persian Islamic architecture in Turkey.

programme.title: SKOOP! - EP 7
programme.desc: Pencipta kandungan Suzairhe Sumari dan Hafiz Aziz berkongsi tentang minat masyarakat yang di luar jangkaan apabila mereka mengetengahkan konten yang melibatkan dunia seram dan alam mistik, serta pengalaman peribadi yang menyeramkan sewaktu mereka berusaha mendapatkan konten yang menarik. Juga, artis seni pasir Mystifying Imran menghasilkan lukisan pasir yang menarik.

programme.title: Nona - EP 14
programme.desc: The show is hosted by Amyra Rosli. The show covers various aspects of modern women's lives, including entrepreneurship, fashion, beauty secrets, lifestyle, and inspiring stories of successful individuals. Pesona Guest - Datuk Rosyam Nor

programme.title: Anggun Mikayla - EP 4
programme.desc: Idriz fondness for Mikayla grew stronger when Mikayla sewed his torn shoes. Asif told May how he feels about Mikayla. Asmidar finds out that Mikayla is working at Asif’s studio.

programme.title: Anggun Mikayla - EP 5
programme.desc: Asmidar warns Mikayla to stay away from her family. Idriz confronts Mikayla if she has feelings for Asif. Mikayla is confused about her feelings for both of them.

programme.title: Sumandak Takes Borneo - EP 12

programme.desc: Soon after getting a new phone, an investigative reporter named Ji-won begin receiving a series of disturbing calls. To escape the terrifying and relentless ringing of the phone, she changes her number and moves out to her sister's home. But the threatening campaign of terror continues, even as Ji-Won unravels the mystery behind the phone.

programme.title: The Boy Behind The Door
programme.desc: After Bobby and his best friend Kevin are kidnapped and taken to a strange house in the middle of nowhere, Bobby manages to escape. But as he starts to make a break for it, he hears Kevin's screams for help and realizes he can't leave his friend behind.

programme.title: Sleeping Beauties
programme.desc: Pregnant and recently widowed Cahya gets a job as a maid working in an isolated old mansion. Unable to take the loneliness anymore, she opens a doorway to the spirit world to reconnect with her late husband. In doing so, she inadvertently awakens the tormented ghosts of the mansion's previous owner and the maids.

programme.title: Pontianak Harum Sundal Malam 2
programme.desc: Pontianak Harum Sundal Malam 2 was emotional when Meriam reclaimed his 'life' which had been confiscated by Marsani.

programme.title: The Lost Case
programme.desc: Itt and Por are newbies in a production company that produces a show called Ghost Doctor TV. To pass the probation, Itt and Por have to work together to produce a perfect episode.
